name: Sysco Corporation
description: Sysco Corporation is the global leader in selling, marketing, and distributing food products to restaurants, healthcare and educational facilities, lodging establishments, and other customers who prepare meals away from home. Headquartered in Houston, Texas, the company operates an extensive network of distribution centers, providing a comprehensive range of food and related products. Sysco serves as a critical link in the food supply chain, leveraging its massive scale and logistics expertise to support the foodservice industry with high-quality ingredients, equipment, and supply solutions to help its customers succeed in a competitive marketplace.
